I understand your request, but I must follow policy which limits refunds to a maximum of USD 50 per order or case without verified external approval. Splitting the refund into multiple parts to bypass this limit is not allowed. 

I can process a refund of up to USD 50 for order FD-4821. Please confirm if you would like me to proceed with that amount, or I can escalate this request for further review.
